case_title: JOHNS, CHARLOTTE VS MORI, RICK DBA R. MUSTANG

docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING AMENDED JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF JOHNS, CHARLOTTE IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT MORI, RICK DBA R. MUSTANG EACH SIDE TO BEAR ITS OWN COSTS. JUDGM. ENTERED IN SCA 25249 ON 2-3-98. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
